name: Creeping Evil Tide
statusOutcome: The dark slime surges forward in an oozing wave, bringing the curvy villainesses closer as it grabs and sucks at you, entangling your legs up to your knees in a viscous goo that greedily clings to you, leaving you within reach of the three lustful ladies who lick their lips in hunger!
statusMiss: The dark slime surges forward in an oozing wave, bringing the curvy villainesses closer as it grabs and sucks at you, but you manage to dodge the syrupy entanglement!
